headline: Days after President Trump celebrated ousting incumbent Sen. Bill Cassidy in Louisiana’s GOP primary, Cassidy voted in favor of advancing a resolution that would limit Trump’s ability to wage war in Iran without congressional approval
UK waters down new Russian oil sanctions as fuel prices rise

Two police officers who defended the Capitol during the Jan. 6, 2021 attack filed a lawsuit seeking to stop the Trump administration’s plan to create a nearly $1.8 billion fund for payouts to purported victims of “weaponization and lawfare”

EU negotiators reached a provisional deal to remove some tariffs on U.S. imports as part of the bloc’s trade deal signed last summer, ahead of a U.S. deadline to ramp up tariffs on cars
President Trump’s agreement with the federal government he runs expanded Tuesday to end all pending tax audits of him, his family and his businesses
